name: wx-mcp
description: Agent-first MCP server for local WeChat 4.x data on macOS and Windows, with chat_timeline query/freshness envelopes and structured display-ready message rows.

requires: WeChat 4.x local data directory for the current OS user
macOS release zip includes wx-mcp, wxkey, libWCDB.dylib, install.sh, README.md, llms.txt, AGENTS.md, and mcp-server.json
Windows release zip includes wx-mcp.exe, libWCDB.dll, install.ps1, README.md, llms.txt, AGENTS.md, and mcp-server.json
schema-2 WeChat DB key map is created by macOS wxkey bootstrap or Windows process scan
macOS key setup uses wxkey bootstrap; Windows key setup scans a running Weixin.exe/WeChat.exe process and stores verified schema-2 keys
